query: DESCRIBE users; SELECT s.id as session_id, u.display_name, u.role FROM app_sessions s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE u.role IN ('admin', 'owner') AND s.expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 3;
